Following a substantial $100,000 donation from the Schooner Foundation, GDIRC is set to create groundbreaking initiatives to aid...

news.headline: Cat-themed cryptocurrencies Popcat and cat in a dogs world have surged, approaching a $5 billion market cap. Dogecoin and Shiba Inu have trailed behind, unable to match the gains of these feline coins. Popcat flipped Bonk to become the second-largest meme coin on the Solana network, with a 7.7% 24-hour gain. Mew crossed a $1 billion valuation, a remarkable achievement for a meme coin.
news.summary: Cat-themed cryptocurrencies Popcat (POPCAT) and Cat In A Dogs World (MEW) have surged as top performers in the crypto market. Cat coins now boast a combined market cap nearing $5 billion, showing a 7.7% increase in the past day. Popcat has overtaken Bonk to become the second largest meme coin on the Solana network with MEW also hitting a milestone by surpassing a $1 billion valuation. Meanwhile, leading memes Dogecoin and Shiba Inu have shown slower growth. Dogecoin is priced at $0.1399 with a market cap of $20.5 billion, marking a 2.9% increase in the last 24 hours and 15.2% over the past week. Shiba Inu stands at $0.00001781, with a market cap of $10.5 billion, up by 2.7% in the past day and 0.7% over the week. Popcat, priced at $1.59, holds a market cap of $1.56 billion, showing a notable 12.2% growth in the last 24 hours and a 22% increase over the week. The popularity of cat-related cryptocurrencies has overshadowed that of other established meme coins.

news.headline: Nasdaq and Tesla rise; ServiceNow rallies. Gold miner triggers sell rule. Jobless claims down. Live stock market coverage.
news.summary: Early on Thursday, the stock market exhibited primarily bullish behavior with a rise in weekly jobless claims and a flurry of earnings reports. The Nasdaq maintained its gains while Tesla saw a significant increase. ServiceNow also experienced a rally. However, one gold miner prompted a sell rule. Live coverage of these events is available on Investor's Business Daily. This positive trend reflects growing confidence in the market, with investors closely monitoring these developments. The market's performance is indicative of a robust economic outlook, with significant movements in key stock indicators. Be sure to stay updated on the latest market developments to make informed investment decisions.

news.headline: Government's crypto wallet tied to Bitfinex hack drained of $20M in suspicious transactions on Thursday.
news.summary: On Thursday, a United States government wallet connected to the hack of the Bitfinex exchange experienced suspicious transactions that led to its depletion.

news.headline: Anthem Blue Cross & Blue Shield partners with Healthy Birth Day to expand Count the Kicks program in NY, aiming to prevent 1 in 4 stillbirths.
news.summary: Anthem Blue Cross and Blue Shield Foundation recently announced a collaboration with Healthy Birth Day, Inc. to enhance the evidence-based Count the Kicks stillbirth prevention initiative in Bronx, Kings, and Queens counties within New York state. This program intends to inform soon-to-be parents about the significance of tracking their baby’s movements during the final trimester of pregnancy. Studies indicate that a minimum of 25% of stillbirth cases can be avoided through proper parental education on this crucial matter.

news.headline: MOC Imbalance
Loggerhead sea turtle released off San Diego coast by VAMMR, SeaWorld San Diego Rescue, and Turtles Fly Too. Collaboration for marine life conservation.
news.summary: In a joint effort to safeguard endangered species and conserve marine life, various groups in San Diego collaborated on Oct. 24, 2024. The teams involved included the Vancouver Aquarium Marine Mammal Rescue Society (VAMMR), SeaWorld San Diego Rescue, and Turtles Fly Too. Their recent collective actions involved the smooth transfer of rescued animals.

news.headline: Adena Health in Chillicothe, OH, elevating perinatal care standards at ARMC's Women and Children's department.
news.summary: In Chillicothe, Ohio on October 24, 2024, families seeking the best care for childbirth are turning to the Women and Children's department at Adena Regional Medical Center (ARMC). This department is staffed with dedicated clinicians and staff who ensure the highest quality care for mothers and their babies.

news.headline: 407 International Inc. reports Q3 revenue growth of 16% to $487.1 million, net income up 16% to $212.3 million. Total trips up 2%, EBITDA at $431.0 million. Dividend declared at $0.903 per share. Celebrated 25th anniversary with customers and raised $40,000 for United Way. Awarded 2024 DEI Award.
news.summary: 407 International Inc. reported a 16% increase in revenues for the third quarter of 2024, totaling $487.1 million. Net income also saw a 16% increase to $212.3 million compared to the same period in 2023. EBITDA for the quarter was $431.0 million, up 16% from last year. The average workday trips were 387,432, with total trips up by 2% and vehicle kilometers traveled up by 3% compared to the third quarter of 2023. The company declared a dividend of $0.903 per common share. 407 ETR celebrated its 25th anniversary with a customer contest generating over 225,000 entries, raising $40,000 for charity. The company received the 2024 DEI Award for promoting diversity and inclusion. In community initiatives, they hosted the 407 ETR Keep Moving Clinic and partnered with Tennis Canada for a youth sports event.

news.headline: Peoples Ltd. (OTC: PPLL) reports Q3 2024 net income of $1,853,000. CEO Anthony J. Gabello shares results.
news.summary: In Wyalusing, Pennsylvania, on October 24, 2024, Peoples Ltd. (OTC: PPLL) disclosed their third-quarter 2024 figures. Anthony J. Gabello, the President and CEO of Peoples Ltd., the parent company of PS Bank, unveiled that the net income for the third quarter reached $1,853,000.

news.headline: Columbia Sportswear appoints new creative agency and marketing head. Enhancing brand strategy with unique approach.
news.summary: In Portland, Oregon, Columbia Sportswear Company (Nasdaq: COLM) has revealed a significant update in their marketing strategy. The global company specializing in outdoor apparel, footwear, accessories, and equipment products, shared news of partnering with a new creative agency and appointing fresh leadership to steer the brand's creative direction. With a focus on leveraging the company's rich heritage spanning eighty-six years, the aim is to enhance the Columbia brand's identity and presence in the market.

news.headline: D.A. Davidson advises Allivet on sale to Tractor Supply Company. Allivet is an online pet pharmacy founded in 1992.
news.summary: In Irvine, California, D.A. Davidson revealed that it was the sole financial advisor for the sale of Allivet, Inc. ("Allivet"), an online pet pharmacy. Allivet, established in 1992, offers medications and supplements for pets. The company, owned by Peninsula Capital Partners, is set to be acquired by Tractor Supply Company (NASDAQ: TSCO). Tractor Supply is a prominent company that specializes in pet products. This acquisition marks a significant move in the pet pharmacy industry.

news.headline: InnoVision Marketing Group in San Diego recognized as top place to work in Southern California by Best Places to Work SoCal.
news.summary: On October 24, 2024, InnoVision Marketing Group, a San Diego-based company known for its full-service marketing and global presence, proudly announced its recent accolade of being named one of the top employers in Southern California by Best Places to Work SoCal. This recognition underscores the company's commitment to providing an exceptional work environment.

news.headline: Beef brand shares spooky season recipes for satisfying meals before Halloween night in Denver, Oct. 24, 2024.
news.summary: On October 24, 2024, in Denver, the Beef. It's What's For Dinner. brand released recipes to enjoy before a night of trick-or-treating. Instead of focusing solely on candy, these recipes provide hearty options to satisfy hunger. These meal ideas aim to keep trick-or-treaters energized and full during their festive activities. Get ready to indulge in delicious beef-filled dishes that will ensure a spooktacular evening.

news.headline: American Water Charitable Foundation awarded $825,000 to 31 organizations for Workforce Readiness and STEM Education Programs.
news.summary: In Camden, New Jersey, the American Water Charitable Foundation, created by American Water, the leading regulated water and wastewater utility company in the United States, revealed its allocation of $825,000 to 31 organizations nationwide. These funds are designated for communities served by American Water, as part of the 2024 Workforce Readiness and STEM (science, technology, engineering, math) Education Grant Programs. One recipient, Lansdowne Up, expressed gratitude for the support.

news.headline: Oil prices drop by 1% due to progress in diplomatic efforts for Gaza cease-fire. WTI falls to $70.7/barrel. US and Israeli officials to meet in Doha for negotiations. Conflict started on Oct. 7, 2023.
news.summary: Oil prices, as indicated by the United States Oil Fund (NYSE:USO), saw a 1% decline on Thursday amidst progress in renewed diplomatic efforts for a Gaza cease-fire deal. The price of West Texas Intermediate (WTI) light crude dropped to $70.7 per barrel, marking the second consecutive day of losses. U.S. and Israeli authorities are scheduled to meet in Doha soon to resume talks on a potential Gaza cease-fire and negotiate the release of captives held by Hamas. These discussions, confirmed by officials on Thursday, are focused on ending the deadly conflict that began on Oct. 7, 2023, following a significant attack by Hamas on southern Israel. According to reports from Reuters, David Barnea, the director of Israel's Mossad intelligence agency, will be involved in the negotiations. For more information, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Trinasolar US sues Canadian Solar over patent infringement for TOPCon technology.
news.summary: In Fremont, California, Trinasolar US has initiated legal proceedings to safeguard its TOPCon technology patent against infringement by Canadian Solar. The lawsuit aims to address the unauthorized use of patented technology. Key players involved are Trinasolar US and Canadian Solar, with significant legal implications for the photovoltaic industry. This legal action underscores the importance of protecting intellectual property rights within the solar energy sector.

news.headline: Mikaila Ulmer joins Lemonade Day National Board during National Women’s Small Business Month. Honey business owner.
news.summary: During National Women’s Small Business Month, Lemonade Day National proudly announces the addition of Mikaila Ulmer to its Board of Directors. Ulmer, the founder and CEO of Me & the Bees Lemonade and a Lemonade Day alum, brings her expertise to the organization. Lemonade Day National aims to empower young entrepreneurs and has impacted over 1 million kids across the US.

news.headline: Penns Woods Bancorp reports $14.0M net income for 9 months ended 9/30/24, with $1.86 EPS. Assets at $2.3B, equity at $203.7M..gridy_losses.
news.summary: Penns Woods Bancorp, Inc. reported a net income of $14.0 million for the first nine months of 2024, resulting in basic and diluted earnings per share of $1.86. This is a significant increase from the $11.1 million reported for the same period in 2023. The company saw an increase in net interest income by $2.3 million due to a stabilized cost of funds. They also reported a provision for credit losses of $740,000 for the third quarter of 2024. Total assets increased to $2.3 billion, with total deposits reaching $1.7 billion. Shareholders' equity increased to $203.7 million. Notably, the non-performing loans ratio increased to 0.42%. The company also provided non-GAAP core earnings information and reported a net interest margin of 2.88% for the third quarter of 2024. This growth is attributed to an increase in interest-earning assets and the investment portfolio.

news.headline: Maritime industry urges EPA to safeguard mariner safety and supply chain in California, joint letter sent.
news.summary: In Arlington, Virginia, on October 24, 2024, The American Waterways Operators, representing the American tugboat, towboat, and barge industry, along with maritime labor unions, sent a joint correspondence to Michael Regan, the Administrator of the U.S. Environmental Protection Agency (EPA).

news.headline: R3, a former consortium, is now exploring strategic steps amidst industry challenges, seeking new direction.
news.summary: Originally formed as a consortium, R3 has experienced rapid growth. The company is currently in a phase of uncertainty, eagerly awaiting its next direction.

news.summary: In recent developments, it has been reported that the unemployment rate has surged to 8.9%, reaching its highest level in five years. The number of jobless individuals has risen to 15.6 million, a significant increase from the previous month. Additionally, it was noted that the economy shrank by 4.3% in the last quarter, reflecting the ongoing challenges faced by the labor market. These figures underscore the pressing need for government intervention and support to address the escalating unemployment crisis.

Blue Bird provides 38 propane-powered buses to School District of Philadelphia, serving 200,000+ students. #cleantransportation
news.summary: Blue Bird Corporation, a prominent player in electric and low-emission school buses, recently provided the School District of Philadelphia (SDP), Pennsylvania's largest school district, with its initial set of propane-powered buses. This consists of 38 near-zero emission buses as part of SDP's move towards environmentally friendly student transportation. SDP, serving close to 200,000 students across 218 schools, received these buses from Blue Bird Corporation, listed on Nasdaq as BLBD.

AGCO (NYSE: AGCO) declares quarterly dividend of $0.29 per common share. Board of Directors announced on Oct. 24, 2024.
news.summary: On October 24, 2024, AGCO, a prominent company specializing in agricultural machinery and precision ag technology, based in Duluth, Georgia, made an announcement. The Board of Directors of AGCO (NYSE: AGCO) have declared a regular quarterly dividend of $0.29 per common share. AGCO is a global leader in the sector, renowned for its innovative design, manufacture, and distribution of agricultural equipment. This dividend declaration underlines the company's commitment to providing returns to its shareholders.

news.headline: Render's cryptocurrency price has increased by over 3% in 24 hours to $5.18, after a week of 0.0% losses from $5.15.

The coin's all-time high remains at $13.53. For further details, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: PhotonPharma Inc appoints Derek Brown as new CEO. FDA approved 1st human clinical study for autologous cancer immunotherapies.
news.summary: PhotonPharma Inc., based in Fort Collins, Colorado, has received clearance from the FDA to proceed with a groundbreaking first-in-human clinical trial. The trial will focus on women diagnosed with stage III or IV ovarian cancer and will involve the use of the company's investigational autologous vaccine. This news was announced on October 23, 2024. PhotonPharma Inc. is recognized for its innovative work in developing cancer immunotherapies. This clinical study marks a significant milestone in the field of oncology and offers hope for patients battling advanced ovarian cancer.

news.headline: Medically Home's platform tech aids hospital care for 45,000+ patients at home. Key to acute hospital-at-home care.
news.summary: In a recent development on October 24, 2024, in Boston, it was revealed that a company has identified that its unique platform technology, along with clinical advisory services, expert consulting, and logistics fulfillment abilities, play a crucial role in offering acute hospital-at-home care. This company, named Medically Home, relies on these components to deliver essential services efficiently. This innovative approach highlights the importance of integrating technology and specialized services to provide effective care.

news.headline: Stagwell (STGW) adds Free Practice (Spain), keelbone (US) and SponsorForce (Japan) to its Global Affiliate Network.
news.summary: Stagwell (NASDAQ: STGW), a competitive network aimed at revolutionizing marketing, has recently expanded its Global Affiliate Network by incorporating Free Practice from Spain, keelbone from the United States, and SponsorForce from Japan. This move is intended to enhance their full-service and specialty digital offerings. The addition of these companies is part of Stagwell's strategy to strengthen its presence in the market and provide comprehensive services to clients worldwide.

news.headline: SDI Presence LLC wins NMSDC Supplier of the Year Award – Class IV in Chicago, Oct. 24, 2024.
news.summary: In Chicago on October 24, 2024, SDI Presence LLC received the National Minority Supplier Development Council (NMSDC) Supplier of the Year Award in Class IV. The award highlights SDI's dedication to providing IT services.

news.headline: INmune Bio Inc. shows XPro™ promotes remyelination in animal model study, published in Cell Reports - turning 0 demyelinating cells into 1 remyelinating cell.
news.summary: Findings from a study involving animal models reveal that XPro™ has the capability to transform microglia cells from a state of demyelination to one of remyelination. This novel effect was observed in a significant percentage of microglia cells, with the conversion being successful in approximately 70% of cases. The study highlights the potential of XPro™ in promoting the restoration of myelin, offering hope for the development of new treatments for demyelinating conditions.

This increase is contrary to its performance over the past week, where it faced a 1.0% decline from $71.94 to its current value. At its peak, the coin reached an all-time high of $410.26.
